prohibited_terms.description: Guarantees of investment performance, returns, or outcomes are prohibited. An RIA may not guarantee results.
Promises of investment results or returns are prohibited (distinct from ordinary service language; flagged for human review in context).
Claims that an investment or strategy carries no risk are prohibited.
Superlatives, rankings, and outperformance claims are prohibited unless substantiated and presented with the disclosures required by the Marketing Rule.

prohibited_content.description: Specific performance claims presented without the calculations, time periods, and disclosures required by the Marketing Rule (e.g., net-of-fees figures, standardized periods, gross/net presentation).
Hypothetical, backtested, model, or projected performance shown without the required hypothetical-performance disclosures and audience restrictions.
Client testimonials are disallowed entirely in WRI v1. Compliant testimonial blocks (with required disclosures) are deferred to v2.
Third-party endorsements without the required compensation and material-conflict-of-interest disclosures.
Forward-looking statements about markets or outcomes presented without accompanying risk disclosure.

required_disclosures.label: Registration-does-not-imply-skill disclaimer
required_disclosures.template: Registration does not imply a certain level of skill or training.

required_disclosures.label: Informational-purposes-only disclaimer
required_disclosures.template: Information on this website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute investment, tax, or legal advice.

required_disclosures.label: Regulation S-P privacy notice
required_disclosures.template: We protect your nonpublic personal information in accordance with our Privacy Policy and Regulation S-P.

conditional_rules.description: Advisers with AUM ≥ $100M register with the SEC and state SEC registration in the footer registration line.

conditional_rules.template: {{firm_name}} is a state-registered investment adviser registered with the {{state}} securities regulator.
conditional_rules.description: Advisers with AUM < $100M register with their state(s). State registration is stated in the footer and the matching state overlay (disclosures/state-overlays/<state>.md) is applied.

sec_marketing_rule.title: SEC Investment Adviser Marketing Rule, 17 CFR 275.206(4)-1 (modernized 2021)

sec_form_crs.title: Form CRS / Form ADV Part 3 — Customer Relationship Summary

reg_sp.title: Regulation S-P — Privacy of Consumer Financial Information, 17 CFR Part 248
